slides.title: Snacks that *actually fill you up*.
slides.sub: Most snacks leave you hungry an hour later. These don't — and they're easy.

slides.title: Protein plus fiber
slides.body: The most filling snacks pair *protein with fiber*. That combo actually holds you over.

slides.title: Yogurt and berries
slides.body: *Greek yogurt and fruit* — protein, fiber, naturally sweet. Hard to beat.

slides.title: Apple and peanut butter
slides.body: Swap chips for *apple and nut butter*. Same crunch, far more staying power.

slides.title: Eggs or jerky
slides.body: Keep *hard-boiled eggs or jerky* around. Pure protein when you need a fast win.

slides.title: Hummus and veggies
slides.body: *Hummus with crunchy veg* gives you fiber and fat that actually satisfy.

slides.title: Snack smart. *Stay full.*
slides.body: Snap your snacks and Vibe Health counts them too — so the little stuff stops adding up unseen.

caption:
If your snack leaves you hungry in an hour, it was missing one thing: staying power. 🥜

Pair protein with fiber — yogurt and berries, apple and nut butter, hummus and veg. Save this for your next grocery run. 🔖

Snap your snacks and Vibe Health counts them too → link in bio.
youtube_title: 5 Snacks That Actually Keep You Full
